name: gitview-bridge
description: GitView bridge — serves a git repo (read + working-tree write) and drives/attaches Claude sessions for the GitView Android app.
//: claude-agent-sdk is a real dependency: chat is the bridge's core feature and the packaged .deb must ship it (it was optional before, which made `npm install --omit=optional` in the .deb build drop it → 'cannot find claude sdk' at runtime). sandbox-runtime stays OPTIONAL — it's disabled by default and 14M, so the .deb omits it; enable the sandbox by installing it. The Claude layer still loads both via dynamic import and degrades gracefully if absent. Pin & re-verify their option names against current docs — see docs/DECISIONS.md ADR-010/011 and the mid-2026 research notes.
